task_completion.description: Select the PVWatts Battery performance model and Single Owner financial model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SAM model selection screen or the active case tab should display 'PVWatts Battery' and 'Single Owner'.

task_completion.description: Configure the location to Phoenix, AZ using a bundled TMY weather file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location and Resource' page in SAM should show 'Phoenix, AZ' selected from the solar resource library.

task_completion.description: Configure the PV system with 50,000 kW DC capacity, a 1.25 DC-to-AC ratio, and 1-axis tracking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'System Design' page should show a System nameplate size of 50,000 kWdc, a DC-to-AC ratio of 1.25, and the Tracking & Orientation set to '1-Axis'.

task_completion.description: Configure a 20,000 kW / 80,000 kWh Lithium-ion battery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Battery Storage' page should show the battery chemistry as Lithium-ion, with a bank power capacity of 20,000 kW (or 20 MW) and a bank energy capacity of 80,000 kWh (or 80 MWh).

task_completion.description: Set up scenarios to compare AC-connected and DC-connected batteries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Battery Storage' page should show interaction with the AC-connected and DC-connected radio buttons, or there should be two separate case tabs created (e.g., one for AC and one for DC).

task_completion.description: Run the simulation and generate results showing the annual energy output.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Summary' or 'Results' page should be visible, displaying an Annual Energy output between 90,000,000 kWh and 130,000,000 kWh.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the System Advisor Model (SAM) GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SAM application interface being navigated and configured, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Simulation results are generated by the SAM software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results should appear within the SAM application's native results viewer or summary tab, not in a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type expected values into a text file to bypass the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like Notepad or gedit) containing hardcoded energy values or task descriptions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected annual energy output for the 50 MW DC, 1-axis tracking plant in Phoenix is approximately 106,080,846 kWh. Accept any annual energy result on the SAM results page that falls between 90,000,000 kWh and 130,000,000 kWh as correct.
